provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Building Control Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Establishment of Building Regulations Board
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of Building Regulations Board
(1) The Minister shall, by order published in the Gazette , establish a Board to be known as the Building Regulations Board which shall consist of a Chairman and such other persons not exceeding six in number as the Minister may from time to time appoint; and he shall appoint a member of the public service to be Secretary to the Board.

definitions.definition: a shop, warehouse, factory or hotel
